description_long: This is a semi-circular lounge booth with a rich, dark wood exterior and a deep, curved seating area upholstered in glossy, tufted maroon leather. The booth features high, continuous backrests that wrap around the seating area, providing a sense of enclosure and privacy. The seat and backrest cushions are deeply padded and arranged in a grid-like tufted pattern, enhancing both comfort and visual appeal. The outer shell is constructed from polished wood panels with a natural grain, giving the piece a sturdy and elegant appearance. The open front allows easy access to the seating area, while the solid wood sides and back create a defined boundary. This lounge is reminiscent of upscale restaurant or hotel lobby booths, designed for group seating and social interaction.
description: A semi-circular, high-backed lounge booth with glossy maroon tufted leather seating and a polished dark wood exterior. The design is enclosed on three sides, offering a private, comfortable seating area.
description_view_0: Side view showing the solid wood panel exterior and the curved, padded backrest partially visible inside.
description_view_1: Front view revealing the open entrance, semi-circular maroon tufted seating, and the full wraparound backrest.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, with the wood panel exterior and a glimpse of the inner seating.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the continuous, unbroken wood panel back with only the tops of the backrests slightly visible.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Multiple attached seat and backrest cushions arranged in a continuous semi-circular configuration, all tufted and integrated into the booth structure.
attribute_backrest_design: High, continuous, curved backrest with deep tufting and a grid pattern, providing full enclosure along the booth's arc.
attribute_armrest_presence: No distinct armrests; the booth sides serve as natural boundaries at seat height.
attribute_leg_style: No visible legs; the booth rests directly on a solid wood base that extends to the floor.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Glossy maroon leather with a deep, grid-like tufted pattern on both seat and backrest surfaces.
